data.title: SOL price at $129.51; RSI 43.16 neutral. Predicted targets $142-$148 by Feb with mixed tech signals.
data.description: The cryptocurrency Solana is currently trading at $129.51, and its relative strength index (RSI) stands at 43.16, indicating a neutral stance. According to technical analysis, if buyers are able to regain control of important moving averages, SOL may potentially challenge resistance levels within the range of $142 to $148.

data.title: ADA price at $0.36 eyes $0.37 resistance break. Neutral RSI and bearish momentum signal uncertainty. Possible move to $0.34 support or $0.37 in weeks.
data.description: The current trading price of Cardano (ADA) stands at $0.36, displaying a neutral RSI and a bearish momentum. Based on technical analysis, there is a possibility of the value either reaching the resistance level of $0.37 or revisiting the support level of $0.34 in the upcoming weeks.

data.title: XRP price aims to break $2.30 resistance by Feb 2026, currently at $1.96 with RSI at 44.49. Support at $1.84 noted.
data.description: The digital currency XRP is currently trading at a price of $1.96 with a neutral Relative Strength Index (RSI) at 44.49. Analysts predict a possible increase in value up to $2.30, which is the Bollinger Band resistance. Conversely, a strong support level is noted at $1.84.

data.title: ETH price set to reach $3,350 in February as tech recovery strengthens, with $3,190 as breakout level and $2,915 support.
data.description: In anticipation of potential price movement, the short-term target for Ethereum (ETH) within one week is set at $3,180. Looking ahead, the medium-term forecast for ETH over the course of one month indicates a range between $3,280 and $3,350. Analysts have identified a bullish breakout level at $3,190, with a critical support level noted at $2,915. These predictions reflect the current market sentiment and potential trends for ETH in the near future.

data.title: eGain launches AI Agent for Cisco Webex Contact Center, providing real-time knowledge and guidance to agents.
data.description: eGain has introduced an AI Agent specifically designed for Cisco Webex Contact Center. This new feature provides agents with real-time knowledge and guidance directly on their desktops. The AI Agent aims to enhance efficiency and effectiveness in customer service interactions.

data.title: Global Grow Tents Market to increase from USD 797.74M in 2025 to USD 1.27B by 2032, driven by modern agriculture trends.
data.description: In Dublin, the global forecast for the Grow Tents Market has seen significant growth, starting at USD 797.74 million in 2025 and rising to USD 859.31 million in 2026. Projections indicate that this market is expected to reach USD 1.27 billion by 2032. This growth is driven by various factors, including changes in operational practices, advancements in technology, and evolving commercial strategies within the modern controlled-environment agriculture sector.

data.title: 3M (NYSE: MMM) beats Q4 2025 earnings expectations with $6.023B sales and $1.83 EPS. Projects 2026 EPS of $8.50-$8.70 and $25.25B sales.
data.description: 3M Company (NYSE: MMM) exceeded expectations with its fourth-quarter 2025 earnings report. The company posted adjusted sales of $6.023 billion, slightly surpassing the anticipated $6.012 billion. This marked a 3.7% increase in adjusted sales year-on-year (Y/Y), with adjusted organic sales rising by 2.2% Y/Y. Adjusted earnings per share also saw a 9% Y/Y increase to $1.83, surpassing the predicted $1.80. Looking ahead to 2026, 3M anticipates an adjusted EPS of $8.50-$8.70 (compared to the estimated $8.61) and adjusted sales of approximately $25.250 billion, exceeding the street prediction of $25.040 billion. The company now projects around 3% growth in adjusted sales organic and operating profit margin adjustments.

data.title: Inventor from Park Ridge, Ill. develops MAR - KUTTER tool for warehouse workers, aiming to boost efficiency in cutting & marking boxes.
data.description: In Pittsburgh on January 21, 2026, an inventor from Park Ridge, Illinois shared the development of a new tool called the MAR-KUTTER, designed for cutting and marking boxes. The inventor, a warehouse worker, aimed to enhance efficiency in the workplace through this innovative tool. The MAR-KUTTER serves as a convenient combination tool for box-related tasks and carries the potential to streamline operations and improve productivity in warehouse settings.

data.title: Arbitration tribunal rules in favor of Ipsen over Galderma dispute on R&D agreement termination. Ipsen retains rights to toxin programs.
data.description: On January 21, 2026, in Paris, France, Ipsen (Euronext: IPN; ADR: IPSEY) disclosed the outcome of the arbitration case with Galderma. The Arbitral Tribunal of the International Chamber of Commerce (ICC) ruled in favor of Ipsen, rejecting the claim brought forth by Galderma concerning Ipsen's termination of the R&D agreement. This decision solidifies Ipsen's ownership of its clinical stage toxin projects in the aesthetic sector. This resolution marks a significant advancement for Ipsen and underscores its exclusive rights to pursue advancements in this area.

data.title: Royal Caribbean Group (NYSE: RCL) named to Fortune World's Most Admired Companies™ 2026 list for the first time, highlighting innovation and leadership.
data.description: Miami, January 21, 2026 - Royal Caribbean Group (NYSE: RCL) has been honored by being listed on the Fortune World's Most Admired Companies 2026 list, underlining the company's international recognition for innovation, leadership, and culture. This recognition showcases the company's growing global reputation.

data.title: Belgian Competition Authority greenlights Aedifica's exchange offer on Cofinimmo shares; offer begins on 30 Jan 2026.
data.description: Aedifica's exchange offer for all Cofinimmo shares has been given the green light by the Belgian Competition Authority. This offer is set to commence on January 30, 2026.

data.title: Ubisoft to reset operations for creative leadership, sustainable growth.
data.description: Ubisoft has recently disclosed plans for a significant reorganization, operational changes, and adjustments to their portfolio. These changes aim to regain creative control in the industry and boost sustainable growth. The company is looking to revamp various aspects of its operations in order to achieve this goal. No specific numbers were provided in the news.
